Plain-English Guide

What Is Claude AI?
(And Why Business Owners Should Pay Attention)

Claude is Anthropic's AI assistant — and for a growing number of B2B companies, it's becoming core operating infrastructure. Here's what it is, what it's actually good at, and what you need to know.

Get Help Implementing Claude → Claude for SMB
The Basics

What Claude is,
in plain English.

Claude is a large language model (LLM) built by Anthropic, an AI safety company founded in 2021 by former OpenAI researchers. Like ChatGPT, it's a conversational AI that can read, write, analyze, and reason across almost any domain. Where Claude differs is in its design philosophy: Anthropic built it with a focus on being genuinely helpful, harmless, and honest — which in practice means it handles nuanced, high-stakes business writing better than most competitors.

✍️
Writing & Editing
Long-form content, proposal writing, client communication, thought leadership. Follows brand voice instructions unusually well.
🔍
Research & Synthesis
Analyze documents, synthesize research, pull patterns from messy inputs. Handles long documents without losing context.
🧠
Reasoning & Analysis
Works through complex problems step-by-step. Useful for strategy work, competitive analysis, and structured thinking on hard problems.
💻
Code & Automation
Write, debug, and explain code. Build automations. Increasingly used by non-technical business owners to create simple internal tools.
Claude vs. ChatGPT

How Claude compares to ChatGPT
at a high level.

Both are capable. The differences that matter for business use are more nuanced than the marketing suggests.

Dimension ChatGPT (OpenAI) Claude (Anthropic)
Long document handling Good, especially with GPT-4o Excellent — 200K token context window on Claude 3 models
Writing quality Strong across most formats Generally preferred for long-form, nuanced business writing
Following complex instructions Good Very strong — especially multi-step, detailed system prompts
Coding Very strong, especially with plugins Strong, slightly behind GPT-4o in some benchmarks
Web search Yes, built-in Available in newer versions
Ecosystem & integrations Larger plugin/API ecosystem Growing fast, API widely used
Pricing (Pro tier) $20/month (ChatGPT Plus) $20/month (Claude Pro)

The honest answer: both are excellent tools. We recommend Claude to our clients primarily because it handles business writing and complex document analysis better — the two tasks that create the most leverage in B2B operations.

Claude Projects

The feature that changes everything
for small business owners.

Claude Projects let you create persistent, customized "versions" of Claude for specific use cases. This is where the real leverage lives.

Persistent memory & context
Upload your brand guidelines, SOPs, client information, or company knowledge base. Claude remembers it across every conversation in that Project — no re-explaining required.
Custom instructions per use case
Create one Project for proposal writing (with your templates and voice), another for sales research, another for customer emails. Each behaves differently, optimized for its job.
Team access
Share Projects with your team on Claude for Teams. Everyone uses the same configured context — company knowledge is institutional, not in one person's head.
Example: a 12-person professional services firm built a "Client Deliverable" Project with their methodology documents, brand voice guide, client context for each account, and their standard output formats. First drafts that used to take 4 hours take 30 minutes. Same quality, consistently on-brand, every time. The project paid for itself on day one.
Pricing Tiers

What Claude costs.

Simple, transparent pricing. No hidden fees.

Claude Free
$0/mo
Access to Claude 3.5 Haiku with usage limits. Good for trying it out.
  • Claude 3.5 Haiku access
  • Limited daily messages
  • Basic Claude.ai interface
Claude Pro · Recommended
$20/mo
Full access to Claude 3.5 Sonnet and Opus with higher limits. Projects included.
  • Claude 3.5 Sonnet & Opus
  • 5x more usage than free
  • Claude Projects
  • Priority access
Claude for Teams
$25/user/mo
Everything in Pro, plus shared Projects, admin controls, and higher usage limits.
  • Shared Projects across team
  • Admin dashboard
  • Billing management
  • Higher message limits

For business use, Claude Pro at $20/month is the obvious starting point. If you have 3+ people using it regularly, Claude for Teams pays for itself quickly through shared Project access.

How Small Businesses Are Using It

Real use cases, not hypotheticals.

These are workflows we've seen B2B companies implement — not AI conference demos, actual operating change.

Marketing Agency
First-draft content at 5x previous output
A 6-person content agency built a Claude Project with their style guide, client brand voices, SEO standards, and topic clusters. Writers brief Claude, get a strong first draft, spend 30 minutes refining instead of 3 hours writing from scratch. Output tripled without adding headcount.
B2B SaaS
Sales proposals from 3 days to same day
A SaaS company built a proposal Project with their product documentation, pricing tiers, case studies, and proven proposal structures. Sales reps drop in a discovery call summary, get a 90% complete custom proposal. One rep closed a deal the same day they had the intro call.
Consulting Firm
Research synthesis in 1 hour instead of 2 days
A management consulting firm uses Claude to analyze competitor reports, industry research, and client data. What used to take a junior analyst two days of synthesis work now takes an hour of Claude-assisted analysis. The analysts do better work because they're analyzing, not formatting.
Law Firm
Client communication that doesn't sound like legalese
A boutique IP firm uses Claude to translate complex legal updates into clear client-readable summaries. Attorneys write the technical content; Claude rewrites it for the client. Clients are more informed, better prepared for decisions, and more satisfied with communication quality.
The Implementation Gap

Having Claude and having Claude
actually work are different things.

Most companies that subscribe to Claude get about 20% of the available value. The difference is implementation — the setup, the training, the workflow design that makes AI output reliable enough to depend on.

That's what Treetop does.

We implement Claude for B2B companies — building the Projects, system prompts, and workflows that make AI output consistent and useful. Then we train your team until they're actually using it every day.
